findings.evidence: Lines 149-151 give only the raw matrix-entry double sum for arbitrary `x y`, while lines 165-185 duplicate the diagonal/adjacency splitting only in the special case `x = y`; Mathlib already has the corresponding adjacency bilinear sum API at `Mathlib/Combinatorics/SimpleGraph/AdjMatrix.lean:425` (`dotProduct_mulVec_adjMatrix`).
findings.fix: Add a general theorem, e.g. `P.intersectionForm x y = (∑ i, P.weight i * x i * y i) + ∑ i, ∑ j, if P.toSimpleGraph.Adj i j then x i * y j else 0`, and derive `intersectionForm_self` from it.
findings.issue: `intersectionForm_self` proves the framing-plus-adjacency expansion only for `P.intersectionForm x x`, even though the same decomposition is the natural bilinear API for arbitrary `x y`.

summary: The API is mostly at the intended plumbing-graph level, but the expanded pairing theorem is under-generalized to self-pairings.
